prompt: A vast cathedral of knowledge — crystalline structures reaching into a prismatic sky. Streams of data flow like rivers of light between towering organic computing spires. A solitary figure stands at the center, interfacing with the cosmos through gesture. The scale is immense — galaxies visible through transparent walls — but intimate, not threatening. 70s sci-fi surrealism. Psychedelic precision. The feeling is: omniscience, gently held.
styledPrompt:
A vast cathedral of knowledge — crystalline structures reaching into a prismatic sky. Streams of data flow like rivers of light between towering organic computing spires. A solitary figure stands at the center, interfacing with the cosmos through gesture. The scale is immense — galaxies visible through transparent walls — but intimate, not threatening. 70s sci-fi surrealism. Psychedelic precision. The feeling is: omniscience, gently held.
Create an image with a fun retro scientific illustration style.
Additional art direction: 1970s utopian science fiction surrealism. Style of Syd Mead, Roger Dean, and Moebius. Sweeping organic landscapes, impossible architecture, vivid saturated colors. Optimistic, dreamy, humanity-figured-it-out energy. Soft airbrushed quality with precise linework. No text, no labels, no UI elements.
textResponse: Here is your depiction of a vast crystalline cathedral of knowledge, rendered in the precise, optimistic 70s sci-fi style of a Moebius or Roger Dean illustration.
